art_market.summary: Seoul's art scene is vibrant as of late March 2026, with major new exhibitions launched.
new_exhibitions: Spectrosynthesis Seoul (Art Sonje Center, until June 28)
Damien Hirst: Nothing Is True But Everything Is Possible (MMCA Seoul, until June 28)
ongoing: Form into Color by March Avery at Esther Schipper (until April 25)
Park Chan-kyong: Zen Master Eyeball at Kukje Gallery (until May 10)
Kim Yun-shin Retrospective at Hoam Museum of Art (until June 28)

stock_market.summary: As of March 23, 2026, the KOSPI closed at 5,781.20 (March 22), reflecting a 0.31% increase. Markets are cautiously optimistic despite earlier volatility in March.

key_indicators.Key_Drivers: Goldman Sachs raised KOSPI target to 7,000; KRX planning new KOSDAQ tier system.
